## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style (`gofmt`, `go vet`, `golangci-lint`)
- [ ] I added tests where appropriate
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes locally
- [ ] I updated documentation (README, MASTER-VISION, package docs) if needed
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if user-visible
- [ ] My commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] I signed off my commits with `git commit -s` (DCO)
